path_constraints.start_rule: Each layer may start at any one cell center chosen by the planner.
path_constraints.end_rule: Each layer ends at the final visited cell center.
path_constraints.note: Only the sequence of scanning cells is optimized; scan direction within a cell is ignored.
added_relation_files: transition_matrix.csv now enriched with geometric relation columns
local_geometry_relations.csv provides compact local neighbor relations
